description: Charts average EC2 CPU utilization over time per instance, filtered by account/region/namespace and a custom tag, using CloudWatch cpuutilization metrics for capacity monitoring.
Flags EC2 instances currently failing the CloudWatch instance status check by taking the max StatusCheckFailed_Instance metric per instance and filtering to only failures greater than zero.
Tracks EC2 CPU credit balance per instance from CloudWatch metrics, summed by instance, to spot burstable instance types at risk of throttling once credits deplete.
Charts the maximum EC2 instance status check failure metric grouped by instance and region to surface instance-level health problems across a CloudWatch account.
Charts the maximum EC2 system status check failure metric grouped by instance and region, indicating underlying AWS infrastructure issues rather than instance-level faults.
Tracks the EBSByteBalance% CloudWatch metric per EC2 instance, summed by instance, to monitor available EBS burst-bucket throughput capacity before throttling occurs.
Charts average CPU utilization per instance broken out by account, region, and a custom tag dimension to compare CPU load across grouped EC2 instances.
Tracks the EBSIOBalance% CloudWatch metric per EC2 instance, summed by instance, to monitor remaining EBS I/O burst credit balance before performance throttling.
Flags EC2 instances failing the CloudWatch system status check, grouping by instance and a custom tag and filtering to only nonzero max failures for rapid troubleshooting.
Charts average EC2 disk read bytes per instance over time from CloudWatch, filtered by account/region/namespace and a custom tag, to monitor storage I/O load.
Charts total EC2 network egress bytes per instance over time from CloudWatch metrics, filtered by a custom tag, to monitor outbound network throughput.
Charts total EC2 network ingress bytes per instance over time from CloudWatch metrics, filtered by a custom tag, to monitor inbound network throughput.
Displays the maximum EC2 instance status check failure value as a single value panel, scoped by account/region/tag, for a quick at-a-glance health indicator.
Displays the maximum EC2 system status check failure value as a single value panel, scoped by account/region/tag, to quickly flag underlying host issues.
Charts average EC2 disk write bytes per instance over time from CloudWatch metrics, filtered by a custom tag, to monitor storage write throughput.
Lists EC2 instances with their average CPU utilization grouped by instance and a user-selected tag dimension, producing a browsable instance inventory table.
Ranks the top 20 EC2 instances by average CPU utilization, grouped by instance and a selected tag, to quickly spot the busiest compute resources.
Charts historical average CPU utilization per EC2 instance grouped by a selected tag dimension, giving a time-series trend view of compute load.
Charts average DedicatedHostCPUUtilization per EC2 instance over time from CloudWatch metrics, applicable to AWS dedicated host deployments for capacity tracking.

Correlates a CSE insight's generating signal, the underlying sec_record fields, and the raw log ingest event to compute lag timings from log receipt through parsing, signal creation, and insight generation, providing a direct link to the raw log search. Uses _index=sec_signal joined via subquery to sumologic_system_events with JSON parsing and multiple timestamp deltas.

Reports per-sourcecategory raw log ingest lag statistics (min/avg/max seconds between message time and receipt time) for CIP-forwarded logs, flagging high lag or negative/future timestamps as error states.
Reports per-vendor/product/mapper ingest lag statistics for normalized sec_record_* events by sourcecategory, computing min/avg/max lag seconds and flagging pipeline delays or clock-skew errors.
Charts the count of CSE insights generated per month broken out by normalized severity level over the last year, reading from a saved insights lookup to show trend and severity mix.
Charts the weekly average hours to remediation for CSE insights by severity over the past year, reading from a saved insights lookup to track SOC remediation performance trends.
Charts the weekly average hours to response for CSE insights by severity over the past year, reading from a saved insights lookup to track SOC responsiveness trends.
Charts the weekly average hours to detection for CSE insights by severity over the past year, reading from a saved insights lookup to track how quickly threats are detected.
Charts insight counts by hour of day for the current month from a saved insights lookup, filling missing hours with zero to reveal daily activity patterns.
Charts insight counts by hour of day for the prior month from a saved insights lookup, filling missing hours with zero, for comparison against the current month's activity pattern.
Charts insight counts by hour of day for two months ago from a saved insights lookup, filling missing hours with zero, extending the hourly activity trend comparison.
Tracks the monthly false-positive ratio and average confidence score of closed CSE insights over the past year, reading from a saved insights lookup to gauge detection quality.
Shows the distribution of CSE insight statuses over the last 7 days as a pie chart, reading from a saved insights lookup for a quick current-workload snapshot.
Lists the top 10 CSE insights from the last 14 days ranked by severity and confidence, reading from a saved insights lookup with detection/response/remediation hours included for triage.
Charts closed CSE insight counts by resolution and severity over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to show how insights were ultimately resolved.
Displays the average hours to response for CSE insights over a configurable lookback window as a single value, reading from a saved insights lookup for a quick SOC KPI.
Displays the average hours to remediation for CSE insights over a configurable lookback window as a single value, reading from a saved insights lookup for a quick SOC KPI.
Displays the average hours to detection for CSE insights over a configurable lookback window as a single value, reading from a saved insights lookup for a quick SOC KPI.
Charts daily average hours to detection for CSE insights broken out by severity over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to reveal detection-speed trends.
Charts closed CSE insights per day by severity over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to show daily closure volume trends.
Charts daily average hours to response for CSE insights broken out by severity over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to track responsiveness trends.
Charts daily average hours to remediation for CSE insights broken out by severity over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to track remediation trends.
Reports closed CSE insight counts by assignee and resolution over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to compare analyst workload and outcomes.
Shows the distribution of distinct MITRE ATT&CK techniques observed across CSE insights over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to summarize attack coverage.
Charts cumulative severity score contributed by each affected entity across CSE insights over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved lookup to rank risk by entity.

Lists the top 25 CSE insights ranked by severity and confidence over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup with detection/response/remediation timings for triage review.
Lists all currently open (non-closed) CSE insights sorted by severity, reading from a saved insights lookup with entity, assignee, and status detail for active workload review.
Reports average detection, response, and remediation hours for closed CSE insights grouped by assignee, reading from a saved insights lookup to compare analyst performance and workload.
Charts CSE insight counts by day and normalized severity over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to visualize recent insight activity trends regardless of status.
Charts CSE insight counts by day and current status over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to show open-vs-closed workload trends over time.
Charts closed CSE insight counts by day broken out by resolution status over a configurable lookback window, reading from a saved insights lookup to track how insights are ultimately triaged.

Ranks entities by cumulative severity score across CSE insights over a configurable lookback window, including false-positive and no-action counts, reading from a saved insights lookup to surface the riskiest assets.

Maps observed MITRE ATT&CK techniques to kill-chain stages across CSE insights over a configurable lookback window, parsing tag JSON from a saved insights lookup to visualize attacker technique coverage.

Builds a deduplicated per-insight status lookup table from sumologic_audit_events and sumologic_system_events cseinsight JSON events, keeping only the most recent status, tags, severity, and timing fields for each insight to populate a scheduled lookup used by other dashboards.
Reports counts of CSE record parsing and mapping failures grouped by sourcecategory, failure reason, parser, vendor, and product, reading from _index=sec_record_failure* to prioritize pipeline fixes.
Counts normalized security records ingested per vendor-product pair, reading from _index=sec_record_* excluding failures, to show which log sources contribute the most CSE record volume.
Counts normalized security records ingested by sourcecategory, parser, and mapper name, reading from _index=sec_record_* excluding failures, to show mapping coverage per log source.

Summarizes CSE signal coverage by vendor and product, computing total severity, distinct entities, and suppressed-vs-generated counts from _index=sec_signal JSON fields to show which sources drive detections.
Ranks CSE detection rules by total severity impact, summing non-suppressed severity and counting distinct entities per rule from _index=sec_signal, with a link to each rule's configuration page.
Ranks MITRE ATT&CK technique tags on generated (non-suppressed) CSE signals by total severity impact, parsing tag values from _index=sec_signal to show which techniques drive the most risk.

Ranks entities by total severity impact from CSE signals, counting distinct triggering rules and suppressed-vs-generated signals per entity from _index=sec_signal, with a link to each entity's detail page.
Ranks non-MITRE (custom or other) tags on generated CSE signals by total severity impact, parsing tag values from _index=sec_signal to surface custom detection categories driving risk.
Shows the severity distribution of newly created CSE insights as a pie chart, reading insightcreated JSON events from sumologic_system_events filtered to status=new.

Ranks entities by aggregated insight risk score, exploding embedded signal/tag arrays from insight audit and system events to sum risk contribution per entity, answering which assets need the most attention.
Charts closed CSE insights broken out by severity and resolution outcome, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events to show how different severities are ultimately triaged.

Maps MITRE ATT&CK techniques observed in CSE insight signals to their corresponding kill-chain stage, parsing embedded signal and tag JSON from insight events to visualize attacker progression coverage.

Ranks detection rules by their contribution to CSE insight generation, computing average signal severity and distinct insight/entity counts per rule from parsed insight JSON, with links to rule config pages.
Ranks tags observed across CSE insight signals by number of distinct signals, insights, and entities, parsing embedded tag and signal JSON to identify the most common detection categories.
Shows the distribution of newly created CSE insights by entity type as a pie chart, parsing insightcreated JSON events from sumologic_system_events filtered to status=new.
Reports fastest, median, and slowest time-to-detection across CSE insights, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events and linking to the worst-case insight for follow-up.
Reports fastest, median, and slowest time-to-response across CSE insights, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events and linking to the worst-case insight for follow-up.
Reports fastest, median, and slowest time-to-resolution for closed CSE insights only, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events and linking to the worst-case insight for follow-up.

Lists each insight's most recent status with its risk score, severity, entity, and an exploded signal timeline, parsed from insight and signal JSON in audit/system events, linking to insight and entity detail pages.
Charts the count of CSE insights by risk score and affected entity, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events to visualize which entities accumulate the highest-risk insights.
Ranks detection rules by total severity contributed to CSE insights, exploding embedded signal JSON to sum severity per rule and count distinct insights, identifying the most impactful rules.
Shows the distribution of signal counts per insight broken out by entity, exploding embedded signal JSON from insight events to reveal how many signals typically compose an insight per entity.
Displays the total count of newly created CSE insights as a single value, filtered to status=new from sumologic_system_events cseinsight JSON events, for a quick KPI snapshot.
Displays the count of distinct CSE insights closed, deduplicating insightupdated audit events with status=closed from sumologic_audit_events for a quick closure KPI.
Displays the count of currently open (non-closed) CSE insights as a single value, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events for a quick workload KPI.
Charts CSE insight counts by severity and affected entity, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events to visualize which entities have the most insights at each severity level.
Displays the total count and average per-day rate of new CSE insights generated over the query window, using queryendtime/querystarttime to normalize the KPI.
Displays the total count (in thousands) and average per-day rate of suppressed CSE signals generated, reading from _index=sec_signal to gauge detection noise volume.
Displays the total count (in millions) and average per-day rate of normalized security events ingested, reading from _index=sec_record_* to gauge CSE ingestion scale.
Charts closed CSE insights broken out by severity and resolution, deduplicated from insightupdated audit events, to show resolution outcome distribution by severity.
Computes the percentage of closed CSE insights resolved as False Positive or Duplicate, deduplicated from insightupdated audit events, as a key false-positive-rate KPI.
Displays the median time-to-detection across CSE insights as a single value, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events for a robust central-tendency KPI less skewed by outliers.
Displays the median time-to-response across CSE insights as a single value, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events for a robust central-tendency KPI less skewed by outliers.
Displays the median time-to-resolution across closed CSE insights as a single value, parsing insight JSON from audit/system events for a robust central-tendency KPI less skewed by outliers.
Computes the percentage of closed CSE insights resolved with No Action taken, deduplicated from insightupdated audit events, to gauge how often insights required no remediation.
Charts new CSE insights created per day broken out by severity, parsing insightcreated JSON from sumologic_system_events to visualize daily detection volume trends.
Charts closed CSE insights per day broken out by resolution outcome, parsing insightupdated audit events to visualize daily triage-outcome trends over time.

Computes the ratio of closed-to-opened CSE insights as a single percentage value, combining closed audit events and new-insight system events to gauge whether the SOC is keeping pace with new detections.

Reports data volume ingestion stats (event counts and GB) broken out by a selected dimension and data tier, parsing volume-index JSON from _index=sumologic_volume for SIEM Flex capacity and cost tracking.
Charts ingested GB over time by a selected dimension and data tier, parsing volume-index JSON from _index=sumologic_volume and rolling up small contributors into 'other' for a readable trend chart.
Lists recent unhealthy collection health-change events with error details and severity, reading Health-Change events from _index=sumologic_system_events to help diagnose collector problems.
Charts unhealthy collection health-change events over time broken out by error type, reading from _index=sumologic_system_events to visualize collector reliability trends.

Flags data sources with ingest spikes or new sources exceeding 150% of their 3-week average volume, using compare-with-timeshift on _index=sumologic_volume to detect anomalous growth for SIEM Flex billing awareness.
Flags data sources with ingest drops below 50% of their 3-week average or that have gone silent, using compare-with-timeshift on _index=sumologic_volume to catch broken collection pipelines.

Lists recent collector create/update/delete audit events with operator, IP, and collector type detail, parsing JSON from _index=sumologic_audit_events to track configuration changes for security review.

Lists recent source create/update/delete audit events with operator, IP, and source type detail, parsing JSON from _index=sumologic_audit_events to track collection configuration changes for security review.
Reports CSE signal generation counts and distinct entities by vendor and product, reading _index=sec_signal JSON fields to show which log sources contribute the most detections.
Counts normalized CSE records created per vendor/product across all sec_record_* views (audit, authentication, email, endpoint, failure, network, notification) to show mapping coverage breadth.
Reports counts of CSE record parsing/mapping failures grouped by sourcecategory, failure reason, parser, vendor, and product, reading from _index=sec_record_failure* to prioritize pipeline fixes.

Lists triggered monitor alerts whose name matches ingest/collection/collector/source/throttling/flex keywords, parsing alert JSON from _index=sumologic_system_events to surface collection-health alerting noise.

Summarizes signal activity for a selected Cloud SIEM rule, computing average severity, distinct entities, and counts of suppressed versus generated signals from sec_signal to gauge rule health and noise.
Breaks down signal generation and suppression per entity for a selected Cloud SIEM rule, showing average severity and suppressed/generated counts by entity id from sec_signal to find noisy entities.
Shows which vendors, products, and source categories contributed signals for a selected Cloud SIEM rule, parsing fullRecords JSON from sec_signal and counting distinct signals per combination.
Lists the distinct device event ids seen in signals for a selected Cloud SIEM rule, parsing fullRecords metadata from sec_signal and counting distinct signals per device event id.
Lists the log mapper names that produced records feeding signals for a selected Cloud SIEM rule, parsing fullRecords metadata_mapperName from sec_signal to trace signal provenance.

Reports insight generation impact for a specific rule (parameterized), aggregating average risk score, confidence, and signal counts by entity from parsed insight and signal JSON to evaluate that rule's effectiveness.

Reports tag usage for signals generated by a specific rule (parameterized), computing max severity and distinct entity/rule counts per tag from _index=sec_signal to characterize that rule's detections.
Tracks how many signals were suppressed for a selected Cloud SIEM rule over time, comparing the current period against the same period 7 days ago via compare-with-timeshift on sec_signal.

Tracks how many signals were actually generated (not suppressed) for a selected Cloud SIEM rule over time, comparing the current period against the same period 7 days ago via compare-with-timeshift on sec_signal.
Lists the record parsers that produced the underlying records for a selected Cloud SIEM rule's signals, parsing fullRecords metadata_parser from sec_signal to trace which parser feeds this rule.
Breaks down signal suppression reasons per entity for a selected Cloud SIEM rule, counting distinct suppressed signals and listing suppression reasons by entity from sec_signal to guide rule tuning.
Summarizes signal suppression reasons for a selected Cloud SIEM rule, counting distinct entities and suppressed signals per suppression reason from sec_signal to identify the dominant tuning causes.
Audits configuration change events for a specific Cloud SIEM rule, parsing sumologic_audit_events/sumologic_system_events rule JSON to show who changed what (old/new values) for that rule over time.
Lists distinct sourcecategories contributing signals to a specific rule (parameterized), counting distinct signal IDs per sourcecategory from _index=sec_signal to show that rule's data coverage.
Lists CSE detection rule create/update/delete audit events with rule name and enabled state, parsing multiple rule-type JSON payloads from audit/system events to track rule configuration changes.
Lists CSE rules whose most recent state is disabled or marked as prototype, parsing rule JSON from audit/system events to flag rules that may not be actively protecting the environment.
Lists CSE rule deletion audit events with rule name, operator, and timestamp, parsing rule JSON from audit/system events to track who removed detection rules and when.
Lists CSE rule creation audit events with rule name, enabled state, and operator, parsing rule JSON from audit/system events to track newly added detection rules.
Lists detailed CSE rule change audit events including operator, expression, severity mapping, tags, and before/after values, parsing rule JSON from audit/system events for full change auditing.
Charts CSE rule and mapping change events over time broken out by event name, reading audit/system events to visualize the pace of configuration changes.
Charts CSE rule and mapping change events over time broken out by operator email, reading audit/system events to show which users are making the most configuration changes.
Lists detailed CSE log mapping change events including mapping name, source, record type, vendor, product, and field changes, parsing logMapping JSON from audit/system events for change auditing.
Charts suppressed versus generated signal counts over time for a specific entity (parameterized), reading _index=sec_signal to visualize that entity's detection activity trend.

Reports signal generation and suppression counts for a specific entity (parameterized), grouped by rule, product, vendor, sourcecategory, and parser from _index=sec_signal to show detection coverage for that entity.
Charts insights generated over time by severity for a specific entity (parameterized), parsing insightcreated JSON from sumologic_system_events to visualize that entity's detection history trend.
Lists detection rules that fired insights for a specific entity (parameterized), summarizing signal and insight counts with example signal detail parsed from insightcreated JSON.
Lists the full event history of insight status changes for a specific entity (parameterized), parsing insight JSON from audit/system events with normalized severity labels for a timeline view.

Summarizes signal activity for a specific entity (parameterized) by rule, severity, product, vendor, and sourcecategory, reading _index=sec_signal to give a high-level detection profile for that entity.
Charts non-suppressed signals generated over time by rule for a specific entity (parameterized), reading _index=sec_signal to visualize which rules are actively firing for that entity.
Lists detection rules fired for a specific entity (parameterized) with severity, description, tags, and generated/suppressed counts, reading _index=sec_signal for a rule reference table.
Ranks the severity impact of signals for a specific entity (parameterized) by distinct rule count and suppressed/generated totals, reading _index=sec_signal to prioritize investigation.

Lists a minute-by-minute signal history for a specific entity (parameterized) with rule, severity, product, vendor, and sourcecategory detail, reading _index=sec_signal for detailed forensic timeline review.

Summarizes MITRE ATT&CK tags found in signals that generated insights for a specific entity (parameterized), mapping techniques to kill-chain stages from parsed insight/signal JSON for threat context.
Ranks detection rules by their contribution to insights for a specific entity (parameterized), computing average severity and distinct signal/insight counts per rule from parsed insight JSON.

Parses Cloud SIEM insight-created audit events from _index=sumologic_system_events to extract insight id, status, entity, severity, confidence and remediation timing fields via JSON parsing for demo/reporting use.

Parses Cloud SIEM insight-updated audit events from _index=sumologic_audit_events to surface status changes, assignee, resolution and before/after values via JSON field extraction for demo/reporting use.

Builds a per-insight table of closed Cloud SIEM insights from _index=sumologic_audit_events showing operator, remediation time and whether closure happened inside or outside a configured working-hours window in a chosen timezone.

Explodes embedded signals, rules and tags inside Cloud SIEM insight audit/system events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight so each child signal appears as its own row linked back to the parent insight via regex parsing of the nested JSON.

Tracks the most recent status per Cloud SIEM insight by sorting insight-created/updated events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight by time and keeping the first (latest) status, severity and assignee per insight id.

Ranks the top 25 Cloud SIEM insights by severity and confidence score, deduplicating insight-created/updated events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight to the latest state per insight and compressing embedded rule signals.

Reports mean time to detect, respond to and remediate closed Cloud SIEM insights from _index=sumologic_audit_events, classifying each closure by weekday/weekend and configurable working-hours window to compare in-hours vs out-of-hours response performance.

Charts average response time for closed Cloud SIEM insights over daily timeslices from _index=sumologic_audit_events, split into working-hours vs outside-hours bands via a transpose so trends can be compared side by side.

Charts average remediation time for closed Cloud SIEM insights over daily timeslices from _index=sumologic_audit_events, split into working-hours vs outside-hours bands via a transpose to compare closure speed by shift.

Scatter-plots response time per insight for closures that occurred inside the configured working-hours window, using _index=sumologic_audit_events insight-updated events to visualize the spread of in-hours response performance.

Scatter-plots remediation time per insight for closures that occurred inside the configured working-hours window, using _index=sumologic_audit_events insight-updated events to visualize the spread of in-hours remediation performance.

Scatter-plots response time per insight for closures that occurred outside the configured working-hours window, using _index=sumologic_audit_events insight-updated events to spot slower after-hours response performance.

Scatter-plots remediation time per insight for closures that occurred outside the configured working-hours window, using _index=sumologic_audit_events insight-updated events to spot slower after-hours remediation performance.

Maps Cloud SIEM insights to their contributing signals and rules by parsing insight-created/updated events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight, letting an operator filter by keywords to trace which detection rules fed a given insight.

Bar-charts Cloud SIEM insights grouped by who closed them, parsing insight-created/updated events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight with a keyword filter to see analyst workload and closure attribution.

Ranks entities by a computed severity score across their Cloud SIEM insights from audit/system events, including false-positive and no-action counts and average confidence, to surface the riskiest assets under active investigation.

Ranks the top 25 Cloud SIEM insights by severity and confidence, parsing insight-created/updated events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight with a keyword filter to surface the most critical active insights.

Cross-tabulates the count of distinct Cloud SIEM insights by current status and severity from deduplicated audit/system events, filterable by keyword, giving a snapshot of open workload by severity tier.

Reports the fastest, median and slowest time-to-response for closed Cloud SIEM insights, parsing insight events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight and computing percentile statistics with a keyword filter for scoped analysis.

Charts closed Cloud SIEM insights over a configurable timeslice broken down by severity, parsing insight-updated events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight with a keyword filter to visualize closure volume and severity mix over time.

Charts newly created Cloud SIEM insights over a configurable timeslice broken down by severity, parsing insight-created events from _index=sumologic_system_events and transposing severity into columns to track new-insight volume trends.

Charts Cloud SIEM insight lifecycle events (created/updated/closed) over a configurable timeslice from audit/system events, transposed by event-status combination to visualize the full case lifecycle flow.

Builds a mapping table of detection rules to the Cloud SIEM insights they generated, parsing insight events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight with a keyword filter to help tune which rules drive the most insights.

Lists triggered Cloud SIEM detection rules with counts of distinct insights, entities, and signals plus average severity, from deduplicated audit/system events, filterable by keyword, ranking which rules fire most.
Lists the tags triggered across Cloud SIEM insights, parsing insight events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight with a keyword filter to review which MITRE or custom tags are firing most often.

Reports the fastest, median and slowest time-to-detection for closed Cloud SIEM insights, parsing insight events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight and computing percentile statistics with a keyword filter for scoped analysis.

Reports the fastest, median and slowest time-to-remediation for closed Cloud SIEM insights, parsing insight events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight and computing percentile statistics with a keyword filter for scoped analysis.
Lists the full chronological event history (created/updated/closed) for Cloud SIEM insights from audit/system events, filterable by keyword, giving analysts a raw audit trail per case.
Retrieves the single most recent status record per Cloud SIEM insight from audit/system events, filterable by keyword, deduplicating the event stream into a current-state view for the SOC.

Maps affected entities to their related Cloud SIEM insights, detection rules and tags, parsing insight events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight with a keyword filter to see which assets are triggering the most detections.

Compares new Cloud SIEM insight volume and total severity against the same period last week, parsing insight-created events from _index=sumologic_system_events over a configurable timeslice with a time-shifted comparison.

Cross-tabulates closed Cloud SIEM insight counts by resolution outcome and severity from deduplicated audit/system events, filterable by keyword, to show the mix of true-positive versus false-positive closures per severity tier.
Maps MITRE ATT&CK techniques appearing in Cloud SIEM insights, parsing insight events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight with a keyword filter to show technique coverage across current detections.

Charts closed Cloud SIEM insights over a configurable timeslice broken down by resolution outcome, parsing insight-updated events from _sourcecategory=cseinsight with a keyword filter to track closure reasons over time.

Charts Cloud SIEM record mapping failures over time from _index=sec_record_failure broken down by original source category, transposing categories into columns to spot which sources are failing to parse.

Charts Cloud SIEM record mapping failures over time from _index=sec_record_failure broken down by vendor-product combination, transposing the concatenated field into columns to track which integrations are failing.

Pie-charts the share of Cloud SIEM record mapping failures from _index=sec_record_failure by original source category, filterable by source category and search term, to identify the biggest failing source.

Pie-charts the share of Cloud SIEM record mapping failures from _index=sec_record_failure by concatenated vendor-product, filterable by source category and search term, to identify the biggest failing integration.

Pie-charts Cloud SIEM record mapping failures from _index=sec_record_failure grouped by device event id, filterable by source category and search term, to see which event types most often fail to map.
Charts Cloud SIEM record mapping failures over time from _index=sec_record_failure broken down by device event id, transposing the field into columns to track failure trends per event type.

Lists Cloud SIEM mapping-failure counts from _index=sec_record_failure broken down by source category, vendor, product, device event id and parser, sorted by frequency to triage which mapping combinations need fixing.

Retrieves up to 100 sample raw log messages for unmapped Cloud SIEM records using a subquery against _index=sec_record_failure to pull matching message ids, letting an engineer inspect real payloads that failed mapping.

Charts Cloud SIEM record mapping failures over time from _index=sec_record_failure broken down by metadata parser, transposing parsers into columns to identify which parser is producing the most failures.

Charts Cloud SIEM record mapping failures over time from _index=sec_record_failure broken down by truncated failure reason string, transposing reasons into columns to identify recurring mapping error causes.

Summarizes Cloud SIEM records from _index=sec_record_* by vendor, product, mapper, parser, device event id, object type and classification, counting and sorting by vendor to give an inventory of mapped record types.
Charts the 15-minute trend of Cloud SIEM record parsing failures by failure reason, transposing sec_record_failure* counts into a time series to spot when specific failure types spike.
Charts the 15-minute trend of Cloud SIEM record parsing failures by source category, transposing sec_record_failure* counts into a time series to identify which sources are failing over time.

Compares today's Cloud SIEM record mapping failure counts from _index=sec_record_failure* against yesterday by source category and failure reason, and builds a clickable drill-down search URL for each row for troubleshooting.
Ranks the most common Cloud SIEM record parsing failure reasons across all sources, aggregating sec_record_failure* by failure reason field to prioritize fixes.
Ranks source categories generating the most Cloud SIEM record parsing failures, aggregating sec_record_failure* by metadata_sourceCategory to prioritize which sources need attention.

Counts Cloud SIEM signals from _sourceCategory=asoc/*signal*, parsing JSON to compute distinct entities, usernames, suppressed vs generated totals per detection rule, product and vendor for signal-volume triage.

Summarizes Cloud SIEM signals from _sourceCategory=asoc/*signal* by rule, entity, attack stage, product and vendor, parsing JSON fields and computing suppressed/generated counts with the latest signal time per group.

Maps Cloud SIEM signals from _sourceCategory=asoc/*signal* to their underlying metadata parser, mapper name, device event id, product and vendor, counting suppressed/generated totals per rule to audit signal-to-source mappings.
Bar-charts Cloud SIEM signal counts per detection rule from _index=sec_signal filtered by keywords, highlighting how many signals per rule were suppressed to help tune noisy rules.

Tracks the daily trend of suppressed Cloud SIEM signals compared with the same period 7 days prior, timeslicing _index=sec_signal and summing the is_suppressed flag to detect changes in suppression behavior.

Summarizes suppressed versus generated Cloud SIEM signals per rule, product, vendor, mapper, and source category, parsing entity and metadata fields from _index=sec_signal JSON to audit suppression rule effectiveness.

Lists suppression reasons for Cloud SIEM signals from _index=sec_signal filtered by keywords, parsing entity id and suppression reason via regex and counting distinct suppressed signals per entity and rule.
Tracks the daily trend of actively generated (non-suppressed) Cloud SIEM signals compared with the same period 7 days prior, timeslicing _index=sec_signal and summing the is_generated flag.
Charts non-suppressed Cloud SIEM signal counts over time from _index=sec_signal per detection rule filtered by keywords, transposing rules into columns to visualize firing trends across rules.

Summarizes Cloud SIEM signals from _index=sec_signal by rule, severity, product, vendor and source category, computing distinct entity counts, suppressed/generated totals and a total-severity score to rank rule impact.

Charts summed service error counts for a chosen application/service/environment, quantized from the service_errors trace-derived metric to show current error volume trends.
Charts summed service error counts shifted back 7 days for a chosen application/service/environment, from the service_errors trace-derived metric, to provide a week-ago baseline for comparison.
Charts the top 100 service request-volume series by average, summed from the service_requests trace-derived metric for a chosen application/service/environment, to show current traffic trends.
Charts the top 100 service request-volume series shifted back 7 days, from the service_requests trace-derived metric, to provide a week-ago baseline for comparing current traffic against.
Charts summed request counts per operation for a chosen application/service/environment, quantized from the service_operation_requests trace-derived metric to show per-operation traffic volume.
Charts the top 100 operation latency series by average value for a chosen application/service/environment, from the service_operation_latency trace-derived metric, to profile per-operation latency.
Charts summed error counts per operation for a chosen application/service/environment, quantized from the service_operation_errors trace-derived metric to show which operations fail most.
Ranks the top 10 services by total summed request volume for a chosen application/environment, from the service_requests trace-derived metric, highlighting the busiest services.
Ranks the top 10 services by average latency for a chosen application/environment, from the service_latency trace-derived metric, highlighting the slowest-performing services.
Ranks the top 10 services by average p95 latency for a chosen application/environment, from the service_latency_p95 trace-derived metric, highlighting services with the worst tail latency.
Ranks the top 10 services by summed error count for a chosen application/environment, from the service_errors trace-derived metric, highlighting the services generating the most errors.
Charts successful user create/disable/modify operations over 12-hour buckets from _index=sumologic_audit account_management events, to track admin user-lifecycle activity trends.
Lists the most recent account-management admin activities from _index=sumologic_audit with timestamp, actor, action, target and status, for quick chronological review of admin operations.
Charts account-management audit events over 12-hour buckets broken out by event class from _index=sumologic_audit, to visualize the mix of admin activity types over time.
Charts account-management audit events over 12-hour buckets broken out by source user from _index=sumologic_audit, to see which admins are most active over time.
Maps the geographic origin of account-management admin activities by geolocating the source IP from _index=sumologic_audit, to spot admin logins from unexpected locations.
Charts successful access-key create/delete/enable/disable operations over 12-hour buckets from _index=sumologic_audit, tracking API access-key lifecycle changes for security review.
Charts successful role create/delete/modify operations over 12-hour buckets from _index=sumologic_audit, tracking changes to RBAC roles for security and compliance review.
Lists permissions removed from library content during admin-mode sessions, parsed from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity text, to audit who reduced access on which content and to what target.
Lists library content deleted while an admin acted in Admin Mode, parsed from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity events, filterable by source user for accountability review.
Lists library content moved between folders while an admin acted in Admin Mode, parsed from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity events, showing source content and destination folder.
Lists all raw Admin Mode audit events from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, optionally filtered by source user, as a catch-all audit trail of elevated-privilege actions.
Lists permissions added to library content during admin-mode sessions, parsed from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity text, to audit who granted access on which content and to what target.
Lists content whose visibility was changed to World or Whitelist while an admin acted in Admin Mode, from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, flagging risky public-sharing changes by admins.
Breaks down library content creation events by source user from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, on a pie chart to show who is creating the most dashboards, searches or other content.
Charts content-deletion events over hourly buckets broken out by source user from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, to visualize deletion activity trends per user.
Breaks down library content deletion events by source user from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, on a pie chart to show which users are deleting the most content.
Flags abnormal spikes in hourly content-creation volume from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity using the outlier operator, to detect unusual bursts of content creation.
Lists library content name/description update events from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, parsing out the old and new name/description values for change tracking.
Lists library content moved between folders from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, parsing source content and destination folder, filterable by source user.
Charts content-creation events over hourly buckets broken out by source user from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, to visualize creation activity trends per user over time.
Lists library content copy events from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, parsing source content, target folder and the resulting copy name, filterable by source user.
Flags abnormal spikes in hourly content-deletion volume from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity using the outlier operator, to detect unusual bursts of deletions that may warrant investigation.
Lists library content deletion events from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, parsing the deleting user, content type/name and source folder for a detailed deletion audit trail.
Lists library content creation events from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, parsing content type, name and destination folder for a detailed creation audit trail.
Breaks down content export events by source user from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, on a pie chart to show which users are exporting the most library content.
Lists library content whose visibility was changed away from public sharing, parsed from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity 'updated visibility' events, to track who un-shared content.
Flags abnormal spikes in hourly content-export volume from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity using the outlier operator, to detect unusual bursts of exports that could signal data exfiltration.
Breaks down visibility-change events by content name from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, on a pie chart to identify which library items are shared most frequently.
Lists library content export events from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, parsing content type and name per user and timestamp, for a detailed export audit trail.
Charts content-export events over hourly buckets broken out by source user from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, to visualize export activity trends per user over time.
Lists application-install events from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, parsing the installed app name and destination folder per user, for tracking Sumo app installations.
Lists library content import events from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, parsing content type, name and destination folder per user, for a detailed import audit trail.
Lists content whose visibility was set to World or Whitelist (publicly shared) from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, flagging potentially risky public content-sharing events.

Compares counts of library-content actions (create, delete, move, copy, update, import, export, install, permissions) against the same period one day earlier, from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, to spot shifts in activity volume.
Charts overall library-content user activity over hourly buckets broken out by source user from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, giving a time-series view of who is most active.
Breaks down library-content user activity by action type (create, delete, move, copy, update, import, export, install, permissions) from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, on a pie chart.
Flags users whose hourly library-content activity count deviates abnormally from their own baseline, using the outlier operator on _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, to catch unusual user behavior.

Flags action types whose hourly library-content event count deviates abnormally from their own baseline, using the outlier operator on _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, to catch unusual activity spikes per action.
Charts library-content actions over hourly buckets broken out by action type from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, giving a time-series trend of create/delete/move/etc. activity.
Maps the geographic origin of library-content user activity by geolocating the source IP from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, to spot content changes originating from unexpected locations.
Breaks down library-content actions by success/failure status from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, on a pie chart to show the overall success rate of content operations.
Ranks the top 10 users by total library-content activity count from _view=sumologic_audit user_activity, on a bar chart to identify the most active content administrators.
Lists every permission removed from library content items, parsed from sumologic_audit MANAGE_PERMISSIONS events, showing who removed what access from whom and when.
Ranks dashboards, folders, and other library content by how many permission-removal events they had, parsed from sumologic_audit MANAGE_PERMISSIONS records to spot content with heavy access changes.
Breaks down removed library permissions by the type of grantee (user, role, or org) to show who is losing access most often, based on sumologic_audit user_activity events.
Ranks library content by count of newly added permission grants, parsed from sumologic_audit MANAGE_PERMISSIONS events, to highlight items receiving the most access changes.
Breaks down newly added library permissions by grantee type (user, role, or org) using sumologic_audit MANAGE_PERMISSIONS events to show who is gaining access most frequently.
Lists every permission added to library content items, parsed from sumologic_audit MANAGE_PERMISSIONS events, with timestamp, acting user, content, grantee, and specific permissions granted.

Shows the proportion of triggered scheduled-search alerts by notification destination (email, webhook, etc.), parsed from sumologic_audit SCHEDULED_SEARCH trigger events, to see where alerts are routed.
Charts hourly alert-trigger counts per saved search name over time, parsed from sumologic_audit SCHEDULED_SEARCH events, to visualize which alerts fire most and when.

Compares the current 15-minute rate of all triggered scheduled-search alerts against the same period 7 days prior, using sumologic_audit events and a timeshift comparison to spot alert volume anomalies.
Ranks saved searches by total number of times their alert has triggered, parsed from sumologic_audit SCHEDULED_SEARCH events, to identify the noisiest or most active alerts.
Charts daily counts of triggered alerts broken out by alert type, parsed from sumologic_audit SCHEDULED_SEARCH events, to track trends in scheduled-search alerting activity over time.
Ranks webhook destinations by number of triggered scheduled-search alerts sent to them, parsed from sumologic_audit events, to identify the most heavily used webhook endpoints.
Counts webhook delivery attempts for scheduled-search alerts grouped by HTTP status code, parsed from sumologic_audit events, to gauge overall webhook delivery health.
Flags scheduled searches whose webhook deliveries returned a non-2xx HTTP status code, parsed from sumologic_audit events, to surface alerts with failing notification delivery.
Monitors sumologic_audit account_management events from the COLLECTOR source to detect CloudWatch metrics ingest throttling triggered when account ingest quotas are exceeded.
Monitors sumologic_audit account_management VOLUME_QUOTA events tied to LogIngest to detect when log ingestion is being throttled due to exceeding contracted volume limits.
Monitors sumologic_audit account_management VOLUME_QUOTA events tied to MetricIngest to detect when metrics ingestion is being throttled due to exceeding contracted volume limits.
Maps the geographic locations of successful user logins by geolocating the source IP against sumologic_audit login events, useful for spotting logins from unexpected regions.
Charts daily counts of password reset attempts split by success/failure status, from sumologic_audit PASSWORD RESET events, to monitor credential-recovery activity and failure spikes.
Lists the most recent successful login timestamp per user and source host, computed from sumologic_audit login events, to identify stale or inactive accounts.
Charts daily counts of password modification attempts split by success/failure status, from sumologic_audit PASSWORD MODIFY events, to monitor credential-change activity and detect anomalies.
Charts the daily count of successful user logins over time from sumologic_audit login events, giving a trend view of overall account access activity.
Charts the hourly count of distinct users starting scheduled searches, based on sumologic_audit scheduled_search START events, to gauge how broadly scheduled search is being used.
Counts scheduled searches that finished with a failure status, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search FINISH events, as a single-value health indicator for scheduled search reliability.
Counts scheduled searches that were suspended, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search SUSPEND events, as a single-value indicator to catch searches disabled due to repeated failures.
Charts hourly scheduled-search start counts split by completion status, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search START events, to visualize execution volume and reliability trends over time.
Counts scheduled searches that timed out with a failure status, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search TIMEOUT events, as a single-value indicator flagging searches taking too long to complete.
Charts scheduled-search CREATE, UPDATE, and DELETE operations over 12-hour buckets, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search events, to track configuration change activity over time.
Lists the 10 most recent scheduled-search errors — timeouts, suspensions, skips, or failures — with the search name, id, and owning user, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search events.
Lists all suspended scheduled searches with the suspension timestamp, search name, id, and owning user, parsed from sumologic_audit scheduled_search SUSPEND events for remediation follow-up.
Charts hourly scheduled-search completion counts split by status, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search FINISH events, to visualize success versus failure trends over time.
Counts scheduled searches that were skipped, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search SKIP events, as a single-value indicator flagging missed executions typically caused by resource contention.
Ranks the 10 scheduled searches with the most timeout, suspend, skip, or failure events, from sumologic_audit scheduled_search events, to prioritize which saved searches need investigation.

Displays the account's contracted daily log ingest capacity as a single value, derived from a customer-supplied parameter alongside sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume data, for capacity-utilization comparison.
Computes the actual average daily log ingest rate in GB from sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume JSON records, summed and divided by the query time range in days.
Calculates log-ingest capacity utilization as a percentage by dividing actual average daily GB ingested (from sumologic_volume) by the contracted daily capacity parameter.
Displays the account's contracted metrics data-points-per-minute (DPM) ingest capacity as a single value, based on a customer-supplied parameter, for comparison against actual DPM usage.
Computes the actual average metrics ingest rate in data points per minute (DPM) from sumologic_volume collector_metrics_volume records over the query time range.
Calculates metrics DPM ingest capacity utilization as a percentage by dividing the actual DPM rate (from sumologic_volume) by the contracted DPM capacity parameter.
Detects statistical outliers in daily log ingest volume per selected tier from sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume records, flagging days with abnormal spikes or drops.
Forecasts future hourly log ingest volume using an auto-regressive model on sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume data, projecting 20 periods ahead for the selected tier.
Charts the top 5 collectors by daily log ingest volume over time from sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume data, ranked and transposed for a stacked comparison view.
Flags collectors among the daily top 5 by ingest volume whose data grew versus the prior day, comparing sumologic_volume figures with a one-day timeshift to surface ingest spikes.
Charts the top 5 source categories by daily log ingest volume over time from sumologic_volume sourcecategory_and_tier_volume data, ranked and transposed for trend comparison.
Flags source categories among the daily top 5 by ingest volume whose data grew versus the prior day, comparing sumologic_volume figures with a one-day timeshift to surface ingest spikes.
Charts the top 5 source hosts by daily log ingest volume over time from sumologic_volume sourcehost_and_tier_volume data, ranked and transposed for trend comparison.
Flags source hosts among the daily top 5 by ingest volume whose data grew versus the prior day, comparing sumologic_volume figures with a one-day timeshift to surface ingest spikes.

Flags sources among the daily top 5 by ingest volume whose data grew versus the prior day, comparing sumologic_volume figures with a one-day timeshift to surface ingest spikes.

Flags source names among the daily top 5 by ingest volume whose data grew versus the prior day, comparing sumologic_volume figures with a one-day timeshift to surface ingest spikes.
Detects the most recent hourly log-ingest spike where volume dropped more than 50% versus the prior hour, computed from sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume data via a diff-based comparison.
Charts total daily log ingest volume in GB for the selected tier, aggregated from sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume JSON records, to track ingest trends over time.

Compares daily log ingest volume against the account's contracted daily ingest capacity parameter, using sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume data, to visualize headroom or overage.

Charts the daily count of source categories falling in the 1-30% share-of-volume band, from sumologic_volume sourcecategory_and_tier_volume data, tracking partition-candidate counts over time.
Lists source categories contributing more than 30% of total log volume, computed from sumologic_volume sourcecategory_and_tier_volume data, to flag dominant categories worth partitioning.
Displays the average daily log ingest rate in GB/day for the selected tier as a single value, computed from sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume data over the query time range.
Displays the total log data ingested in GB for the selected tier as a single value, summed from sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume data over the query time range.

Ranks the top 5 collectors by total and average daily log volume for the selected tier, computed from sumologic_volume collector_and_tier_volume data.

Lists Cloud SIEM detection rules that changed, reading sumologic_audit_events/sumologic_system_events for cse* sources and extracting embedded rule JSON (match/threshold/chain/aggregation/YARA) to show rule id, name, enabled state, expression, and event counts.

Flags Cloud SIEM rules that are still prototypes or were recently re-enabled, parsing audit/system event JSON for rule state per rule id/name and filtering to rows where enabled is false or isPrototype is true for governance review.
Reports every Cloud SIEM rule deletion event from sumologic_audit_events/sumologic_system_events, parsing the embedded rule JSON to show which rule id and name was removed, by whom, and when.

Reports every Cloud SIEM rule creation event from sumologic_audit_events/sumologic_system_events, parsing the embedded rule JSON to show the new rule id, name, enabled state, prototype flag, and creation time.

Provides a detailed audit trail of all Cloud SIEM rule change events, extracting operator email, old/new values, and rule attributes (expression, severity mapping, tuning, tags) per event for forensic review of configuration edits.

Tracks changes to Cloud SIEM log mapping configurations by parsing logMapping JSON from audit/system events, showing mapping id, name, source, record type, vendor, product, and enabled state over time.
Charts the daily volume of Cloud SIEM rule and mapping change events over time, split by event name, to visualize how frequently detection configuration is being edited.

Surfaces Cloud SIEM records that failed parsing or mapping by grouping sec_record_failure FailedRecord events by source category, vendor, product, and failure reason, with a deep link to the latest failing message for investigation.

Lists up to 1000 recent failed Cloud SIEM records for a chosen source category, vendor, product, and device event id, showing the parse failure reason per message and timestamp for detailed troubleshooting.
Summarizes failed Cloud SIEM record counts and the distinct source categories and device event ids for a selected vendor and product, answering which sources are having parsing or mapping problems.
Charts total Cloud SIEM record volume over time using an hourly timeslice across all sec_record* indexes, giving a top-level view of ingestion throughput for the record pipeline.
Charts hourly Cloud SIEM record volume trends broken out by vendor and product, transposing sec_record* counts into a time series to reveal which sources are driving ingestion.

Tabulates successfully processed Cloud SIEM record counts by object type, vendor, product, and source category, excluding unknown vendors and failed records, to show which sources are actively mapped.
Lists source categories that are actively forwarding log messages into Cloud SIEM, counting messages where the _siemforward metadata flag is true to confirm CSE ingestion coverage.

Breaks down Cloud SIEM messages that failed to parse by reason, source category, vendor, product, and device event id, normalizing generic parser errors into a single failed_to_parse bucket for triage.
Charts the trend of non-parsed Cloud SIEM messages over hourly timeslices by failure reason, from sec_record_failure, to spot spikes in parsing errors over time.
Maps which source products most frequently trigger which Cloud SIEM detection rules, joining sec_signal entity metadata to rule id/name and ranking the top 8 source-to-rule mappings by count.
Lists source categories whose messages are NOT being forwarded into Cloud SIEM, counting messages where the _siemforward flag is not true to identify gaps in CSE coverage.

Identifies which sources are failing to parse or map into Cloud SIEM, aggregating sec_record_failure records by vendor, product, source category, device event id, and failure reason with total counts.
Charts the hourly trend of Cloud SIEM records that failed parsing/mapping, broken out by vendor and product, to visualize when and where parsing failures are occurring over time.
Lists source categories forwarding to Cloud SIEM that have a parser configured, counting messages by source category and parser name to confirm parsing setup coverage.
Flags source categories forwarding to Cloud SIEM that have NO parser configured, marking them as NOT CONFIGURED to help identify gaps in Cloud SIEM parsing setup.

Tracks the hourly volume of distinct Cloud SIEM insights matching an optional keyword filter, counting unique insight readableIds from cseinsight-tagged audit/system events as a health/activity indicator.
Charts the hourly count of Cloud SIEM signals matching an optional keyword filter from sec_signal, giving a quick pulse on detection signal volume over time.
Charts hourly volume of generic Audit-type security records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_audit, to monitor audit data flow.
Charts hourly volume of AuditChange records (configuration/change events) ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_audit, to monitor change-event data flow.
Charts hourly volume of AuditFile records (file audit events) ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_audit, to monitor file-audit data flow.
Charts hourly volume of AuditResourceAccess records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_audit, to monitor resource-access audit data flow.
Charts hourly volume of Authentication records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_authentication, to monitor login/auth event data flow.

Charts hourly volume of AuthenticationPrivilegeEscalation records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_authentication, to monitor privilege-escalation event data flow.
Charts hourly volume of Email records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_email, to monitor email-security data flow.
Charts hourly volume of Endpoint records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_endpoint, to monitor endpoint telemetry data flow.
Charts hourly volume of EndpointModuleLoad records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_endpoint, to monitor module/DLL load telemetry data flow.
Charts hourly volume of EndpointProcess records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_endpoint, to monitor process-execution telemetry data flow.
Charts hourly volume of generic Network records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_network, to monitor network telemetry data flow.
Charts hourly volume of NetworkDHCP records ingested into Cloud SIEM matching an optional keyword, from sec_record_network, to monitor DHCP telemetry data flow.

Breaks down insight counts by source/state as a pie chart, using the Cloud SIEM severity recommender model's source_count inference over sec_record* to show insight composition.

Calculates the false positive rate among insights eligible for severity optimization, dividing false-positive resolution counts by total eligible insights from the severity recommender model over sec_record*.

Calculates the false positive rate among insights already optimized by the Cloud SIEM severity recommender model, dividing false-positive resolution counts by total optimized insights over sec_record*, to measure tuning effectiveness.
